_meta.description: Phases define session length, sets, bike/iFIT settings, and the checklist of criteria required to UNLOCK the next phase. Progression is manual + gated: you advance when you tick the criteria, not on a fixed calendar.

phases.label: Foundation
unlockCriteria: Single-leg stance: hold 10 sec each side, eyes open, no wall contact
Glute bridge: 3-sec pause at top × 15 reps, pelvis stays level throughout
Open ritual: 10+ consecutive days completed
Bike: 8-min ride at conversational pace — can speak full sentences throughout
Recovery: no session causes soreness lasting more than 48 hrs
✅ PT check-in: bring these results — PT signs off on advancing to Build

phases.label: Build

deload.volume: 50% sets — same moves, same form, half the work. Recovery week: the gains happen here.

unlockCriteria: Single-leg bridge: 10 reps, pelvis stays level — both sides feel equal
Bird-dog hold: 5-sec hold × 10 reps each side, no wobble or compensation
Step-up: 10 reps without trunk lean or hip drop
Bike: 12-min at slightly harder pace, still conversational throughout
Recovery: 20-min sessions feel sustainable — not wiped out the next day
✅ PT check-in: bring these results — PT signs off on advancing to Strengthen

phases.label: Strengthen

deload.volume: 50% sets — same moves, same form, half the work. Recovery week: the gains happen here.

unlockCriteria: Single-leg calf raise: 10 reps without holding the wall
Box squat: 15 reps, knee tracks over 2nd toe consistently both sides
Bird-dog hold: 5-sec hold × 10 reps — rock solid, zero compensation
Bike: 18-min with hills, no joint complaints during or after
Recovery: bouncing back well between sessions — energy returns within a day
✅ PT check-in before advancing — reassess scapula and ankle with PT

phases.label: Consolidate

deload.volume: 50% sets — same moves, same form, half the work. Recovery week: the gains happen here.

unlockCriteria: This is the final phase — the goal is to maintain and test gains
Reassess with PT before deciding what comes next
